info.title: Finance CLI command adapter contract
info.description: OpenAPI-style schema for adapters that expose Finance CLI commands over HTTP, MCP, or tool runtimes. The CLI itself is local.

post.summary: Describe a backtest strategy and its parameters
post.description: Use for repeatable strategy checks, payload construction, and VectorBT result summaries.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Backtest metrics, trades, plots, or payload metadata.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

post.summary: Build a normalized factor backtest payload
post.description: Use for repeatable strategy checks, payload construction, and VectorBT result summaries.

factor_name.description: Name assigned to the factor signal.

symbols.description: Ticker symbol or comma-separated ticker list.

top_pct.description: Top-ranked percentage used for the long or overweight side.

bottom_pct.description: Bottom-ranked percentage used for the short or underweight side.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Backtest metrics, trades, plots, or payload metadata.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

x-finance-cli.usage: finance backtest.factor.payload FACTOR_NAME SYMBOLS START_DATE END_DATE [timeframe=1d top_pct=0.2 bottom_pct=0.2]

post.summary: Preview quantile factor target weights
post.description: Use for repeatable strategy checks, payload construction, and VectorBT result summaries.

factor_name.description: Name assigned to the factor signal.

scores.description: Mapping of symbols to factor scores.

top_pct.description: Top-ranked percentage used for the long or overweight side.

bottom_pct.description: Bottom-ranked percentage used for the short or underweight side.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Backtest metrics, trades, plots, or payload metadata.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

post.summary: Run a VectorBT strategy backtest
post.description: Use when the user asks to run a named strategy over explicit symbols and dates.

symbols.description: Ticker symbol or comma-separated ticker list.

params.description: Strategy parameters supplied as JSON or key-value pairs.

strategy_file.description: Path to a custom strategy file.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Backtest metrics, trades, plots, or payload metadata.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

x-finance-cli.usage: finance backtest.run STRATEGY SYMBOLS START_DATE END_DATE [params='{}' strategy_file=./rule.py]

post.summary: List VectorBT-backed strategy presets
post.description: Use for repeatable strategy checks, payload construction, and VectorBT result summaries.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Backtest metrics, trades, plots, or payload metadata.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

post.summary: Build a normalized strategy backtest payload
post.description: Use for repeatable strategy checks, payload construction, and VectorBT result summaries.

strategy_id.description: Built-in strategy key to describe, run, or package.

initial_cash.description: Starting cash balance for the simulation.

parameters.description: Strategy parameter object included in the payload.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Backtest metrics, trades, plots, or payload metadata.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

x-finance-cli.usage: finance backtest.strategy.payload STRATEGY_ID START_DATE END_DATE [initial_cash=100000 parameters='{}']

post.summary: Run a bounded VectorBT parameter grid
post.description: Use for repeatable strategy checks, payload construction, and VectorBT result summaries.

symbols.description: Ticker symbol or comma-separated ticker list.

grid.description: Parameter grid where each key maps to candidate values.

metric.description: Metric used to rank tuning results.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Backtest metrics, trades, plots, or payload metadata.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

x-finance-cli.usage: finance backtest.tune STRATEGY SYMBOLS START_DATE END_DATE grid='{}' [metric=sharpe_ratio max_runs=100]

post.summary: Fetch company earnings/dividend calendar fields
post.description: Use for company calendar fields and earnings-date rows.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Company calendar or earnings-date rows.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

post.summary: Fetch earnings-date rows for a company
post.description: Use for company calendar fields and earnings-date rows.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Company calendar or earnings-date rows.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

post.summary: Run PaddleOCR/PP-StructureV3 OCR fallback on a local or remote document
post.description: Use as fallback for scanned or image-heavy PDFs after document.read/scan cannot extract text.

source.description: Source key, path, or URL depending on command.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Document text, blocks, matches, tables, OCR, or window metadata.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

post.summary: Extract native PDF or HTML text and layout/search blocks
post.description: Use for first-pass text extraction from a known PDF or SEC HTML URL.

source.description: Source key, path, or URL depending on command.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Document text, blocks, matches, tables, OCR, or window metadata.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

post.summary: Scan document text/layout for configured topics or literal queries with RapidFuzz
post.description: Use when the user needs phrase, table, or topic discovery inside a filing or document.

query.description: Literal phrase or table text to find.

topics.description: Known topic names or literal queries.

max_chars.description: Maximum text chars to read; 0 means unbounded in current readers.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages for PDFs; 0 means all pages.

start_char.description: Start offset for a bounded scan.

end_char.description: End offset for a bounded scan.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

x-finance-cli.usage: finance document.scan SOURCE|source=PATH_OR_URL [query=TEXT topics=risk,disclosure format=pdf|html match=fuzzy|all_terms threshold=80 max_chars=12000 max_pages=5 limit=50 window=0 start_char=0 end_char=0]

post.summary: Extract compact table previews from text-based PDFs with Camelot
post.description: Use for table previews in text-based PDFs when text windows are not enough.

source.description: Source key, path, or URL depending on command.

pages.description: PDF page selection passed to the table extractor.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Document text, blocks, matches, tables, OCR, or window metadata.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

x-finance-cli.usage: finance document.tables SOURCE|source=PATH_OR_URL [pages=1-end flavor=stream|lattice max_tables=20 max_rows=25]

post.summary: Read a bounded text window around a document offset or scan match ID
post.description: Use after document.scan to read around a stable char offset or match_id without re-scanning the full document.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Document text, blocks, matches, tables, OCR, or window metadata.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

x-finance-cli.usage: finance document.window SOURCE|source=PATH_OR_URL [format=pdf|html start_char=0|match_id=char_START_END chars=4000 direction=around|next|previous]

post.summary: Compare user assumptions against explicit consensus inputs
post.description: Use for explicit estimate comparison math and structured consensus result shaping.

revenue.description: Reported, assumed, or user-supplied revenue input.

consensus_revenue.description: Consensus revenue estimate used for comparison.

eps.description: Reported or assumed EPS value used for comparison.

consensus_eps.description: Consensus EPS estimate used for comparison.

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year for the reported or estimated period.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Consensus estimate or comparison result.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

x-finance-cli.usage: finance estimates.compare [SYMBOL] revenue=2.2B consensus_revenue=2.0B eps=0.50 consensus_eps=0.45 fiscal_year=2027

post.summary: Fetch FMP analyst consensus estimates when configured
post.description: Use for explicit estimate comparison math and structured consensus result shaping.

period.description: Financial statement period, such as annual or quarterly.

page.description: Page number to request from the provider.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Consensus estimate or comparison result.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

post.summary: Read a canonical 10-K section with edgartools
post.description: Use when the user asks for a canonical 10-K section such as business, risk factors, MD&A, or segments.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: SEC filing metadata, section text, reports, or XBRL rows.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

post.summary: Fetch recent SEC filings, optionally classified
post.description: Use first when the user names a ticker but not a filing URL or accession.

forms.description: Comma-separated SEC form types to include.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: SEC filing metadata, section text, reports, or XBRL rows.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

post.summary: Read an edgartools filing summary report
post.description: Use when the user already knows or discovered an edgartools report name and wants rows from that report.

name.description: Report, section, or table name selected by the caller.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: SEC filing metadata, section text, reports, or XBRL rows.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

x-finance-cli.usage: finance filings.report [SYMBOL] [accession=ACCESSION|url=URL] name='Report Short Name' [form=10-K query=TEXT max_rows=25 (0=unlimited) max_chars=8000]

post.summary: List edgartools filing summary reports
post.description: Use for SEC filing discovery, canonical section reads, XBRL statement rows, and filing summary reports.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: SEC filing metadata, section text, reports, or XBRL rows.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

post.summary: List supported and discovered filing sections
post.description: Use for SEC filing discovery, canonical section reads, XBRL statement rows, and filing summary reports.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: SEC filing metadata, section text, reports, or XBRL rows.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

post.summary: Read structured XBRL statement rows with edgartools
post.description: Use when the user asks for structured XBRL financial statement rows such as income, balance, or cashflow items.

symbol.description: Ticker used to locate a recent filing.

form.description: SEC form used when resolving by symbol.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

post.summary: Calculate WACC with explicit debt tax convention
post.description: Use only when all numeric inputs are explicit in the prompt or already extracted with citations.

equity_value.description: Equity market value used in WACC or valuation math.

debt_value.description: Debt value used in WACC or valuation math.

cost_of_equity.description: Cost of equity. CLI accepts decimal or percent.

cost_of_debt.description: Cost of debt. CLI accepts decimal or percent.

tax_rate.description: Tax rate; CLI accepts decimal or percent.

debt_tax.description: Whether cost_of_debt is pretax or already after tax.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Deterministic calculation with inputs and method.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

x-finance-cli.usage: finance formula.wacc equity_value=418856 debt_value=11415 cost_of_equity=9.66% cost_of_debt=6% tax_rate=24% debt_tax=pretax|after_tax

post.description: Use only when all numeric inputs are explicit in the prompt or already extracted with citations.

period.description: Financial statement period, such as annual or quarterly.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Statement rows from Yahoo Finance.

post.description: Use for Yahoo industry keys, overview data, top companies, and research-report tables.

post.summary: Discover IR and investor day presentations from SEC 8-K Exhibit 99 filings
post.description: Use to discover or read investor presentations from SEC exhibits and company IR pages.

source.description: Source key, path, or URL depending on command.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Investor-presentation discovery or text extraction result.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

post.summary: Extract text from an IR presentation exhibit URL
post.description: Use to discover or read investor presentations from SEC exhibits and company IR pages.

ocr.description: OCR mode for presentation or document text extraction.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Investor-presentation discovery or text extraction result.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

post.summary: Extract KPI evidence from filings or transcripts
post.description: Use to collect KPI evidence from transcripts and filings with source snippets.

source.description: Source key, path, or URL depending on command.

metrics.description: Comma-separated KPI or metric names to search for.

quarter.description: Fiscal quarter label, such as Q1 or Q4.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: KPI evidence snippets and history rows.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

x-finance-cli.usage: finance kpi.extract SYMBOL [source=transcripts|filings|both metrics=arr,nrr limit=30 quarter=latest form=10-K]

post.summary: Extract KPI evidence across recent transcripts
post.description: Use to collect KPI evidence from transcripts and filings with source snippets.

source.description: Source key, path, or URL depending on command.

metrics.description: Comma-separated KPI or metric names to search for.

per_document_limit.description: Maximum KPI evidence rows per source document.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: KPI evidence snippets and history rows.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

x-finance-cli.usage: finance kpi.history SYMBOL [source=transcripts metrics=arr,nrr limit=4 per_document_limit=20]

post.summary: Fetch normalized OHLCV records for one or more symbols
post.description: Use for historical bars needed by backtests, event windows, and price context.

limit.description: Maximum bars when date bounds are not enough.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Quote, bars, market status, regime, or sector heat data.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

x-finance-cli.usage: finance market.ohlcv SYMBOL[,SYMBOL...] [timeframe=1d start_date=YYYY-MM-DD end_date=YYYY-MM-DD limit=200 provider=auto include_attempts=false]

anyOf.description: Quote, bars, market status, regime, or sector heat data.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

post.summary: Analyze news volume, tone, context, or geography
post.description: Use for source-attributed news search and GDELT analysis windows.

sector.description: Sector key or sector name to query.

timespan.description: Relative provider lookback window such as 24H, 7D, or 1M.

start_datetime.description: Inclusive start timestamp for precise provider queries.

end_datetime.description: Inclusive end timestamp for precise provider queries.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: News records or analysis result.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

x-finance-cli.usage: finance news.analyze analysis=timeline|tone|context|geo|doc [query=TEXT | symbol=SYMBOL | sector=SECTOR] [mode=MODE max_records=50 timespan=30D|1W|1M|24H date=YYYY-MM-DD start_date=YYYY-MM-DD end_date=YYYY-MM-DD start_datetime=YYYYMMDDHHMMSS end_datetime=YYYYMMDDHHMMSS]

post.summary: Search finance news through GDELT
post.description: Use for source-attributed news search and GDELT analysis windows.

timespan.description: Relative provider lookback window such as 24H, 7D, or 1M.

start_datetime.description: Inclusive start timestamp for precise provider queries.

end_datetime.description: Inclusive end timestamp for precise provider queries.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: News records or analysis result.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

x-finance-cli.usage: finance news.search [query=TEXT | symbol=SYMBOL | sector=SECTOR] [max_records=50 timespan=30D|1W|1M|24H date=YYYY-MM-DD start_date=YYYY-MM-DD end_date=YYYY-MM-DD start_datetime=YYYYMMDDHHMMSS end_datetime=YYYYMMDDHHMMSS]

post.summary: Return a source-linked evidence timeline around a date
post.description: Use when the user asks what filings, news, or transcripts were near a dated price move.

lookback.description: Lookback window around the requested date.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Price moves or dated evidence timeline.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

x-finance-cli.usage: finance price.context SYMBOL date=YYYY-MM-DD [lookback=3D news_limit=5 filing_limit=80 transcript_limit=12]

post.summary: Find large deterministic close-to-close stock moves
post.description: Use for price move discovery and evidence timelines around a date.

window.description: Trading or text window size, depending on the command.

years.description: Number of historical years to inspect.

threshold.description: Move threshold. CLI accepts decimal or percent notation.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Price moves or dated evidence timeline.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

x-finance-cli.usage: finance price.moves SYMBOL [window=1d|3d|1w|1m years=3 threshold=8|8% limit=20 provider=auto]

post.description: Use before executing a complex public-company research workflow.

anyOf.description: Research checklist.

post.summary: Calculate DCF enterprise value from forecast cash flows
post.description: Use only for deterministic DCF math from explicit cash flows and discount assumptions.

cashflows.description: Forecast cash flows. CLI accepts K/M/B suffixes.

discount_rate.description: Discount rate; CLI accepts decimal or percent.

exit_multiple.description: Exit multiple alternative to terminal growth.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Valuation calculation result and assumptions.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

post.summary: Build a simple bull/base/bear sales-multiple scenario table
post.description: Use for deterministic valuation math once assumptions are explicit.

revenue.description: Reported, assumed, or user-supplied revenue input.

shares.description: Share count used for per-share valuation output.

x-finance-cli.usage: finance valuation.scenario SYMBOL revenue=2.2B bear_multiple=7 base_multiple=10 bull_multiple=13 [shares=580M]

post.summary: Calculate weighted average cost of capital
post.description: Use for deterministic valuation math once assumptions are explicit.

equity_value.description: Equity market value used in WACC or valuation math.

debt_value.description: Debt value used in WACC or valuation math.

cost_of_equity.description: Cost of equity. CLI accepts decimal or percent.

cost_of_debt.description: Cost of debt. CLI accepts decimal or percent.

tax_rate.description: Tax rate; CLI accepts decimal or percent.

ok.description: True when the command completed successfully.

anyOf.description: Valuation calculation result and assumptions.

error.description: Human-readable error when ok is false.

x-finance-cli.usage: finance valuation.wacc equity_value=10B debt_value=1B cost_of_equity=10% cost_of_debt=5% tax_rate=21%
